title: cadia ellisiana
intro: Cadia ellisiana, also known as the pink cadia, is a flowering plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to the subtropical regions of Australia and Asia. The plant's flowers and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cadia ellisiana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiviral agent, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Cadia ellisiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams to utilize its medicinal properties.
